message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage The World: Unlock & Master Dio's Stand 2026",
  description: "Master The World Stand in Bizarre Lineage with our comprehensive guide. Learn how to obtain, awaken, and optimize Dio's iconic ability for PvP and PvE dominance in 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/800000/fff?text=Bizarre+Lineage+The+World",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **The World Stand** is a legendary A-tier ability, excellent for combo potential in **Bizarre Lineage**.
- Obtain it via **Stand Arrows** or rare **Lucky Arrows** found through quests, world events, or on the ground.
- Maximize **Stand Conjuration** by meditating, defeating enemies, and completing quests.
- Achieve **Stand Awakening** by reaching Player Level 50 and 100 Conjuration, then completing specific quests.
- Optimize your build with **Hamon** and **Boxing** for devastating time stop combos.
</Callout>

Embarking on your journey in Bizarre Lineage, securing a powerful Stand is paramount, and few are as iconic and formidable as **The World Stand**. Inspired by Dio Brando's legendary ability from JoJo's Bizarre Adventure, The World offers devastating close-range power, exceptional damage output, and incredible combo potential, making it a top-tier choice for both PvP and PvE encounters. This comprehensive guide will walk you through every step of acquiring, mastering, and ultimately awakening **bizarre lineage the world** to its full potential in 2026. Prepare to stop time and dominate your foes!

<Section icon={Swords} title="Understanding The World Stand in Bizarre Lineage">

The World is a legendary A-tier Stand renowned for its overwhelming strength and unique abilities, particularly its signature Time Stop. Players highly value it for its versatility and the sheer power it brings to combat. Its move set is designed for aggressive, combo-heavy playstyles, allowing you to lock down opponents and unleash a flurry of attacks.

**Video Highlights:**
- Demonstrates the journey from a new player to obtaining The World.
- Showcases the process of increasing Stand Conjuration through meditation.
- Provides a glimpse into The World's core abilities like Encirclement and Knives.
- Highlights the effectiveness of farming in the Meditation realm.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="qS8mQs724nA" title="Going From Noob To Dio Brando THE WORLD In Bizarre Lineage...(Roblox)" />

The World's abilities synergize to create a formidable offensive presence. Understanding each move is crucial for maximizing its impact in battle.

| Ability        | Type         | Description                                        | Effect                                                 |
| :------------- | :----------- | :------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------- |
| **Barrage**    | Melee Attack | A rapid flurry of punches.                         | High damage over time, stun potential.                 |
| **Hard Fight** | Melee Attack | A powerful, single-target punch.                   | High burst damage, knockback.                          |
| **Encirclement** | Crowd Control | Traps opponents in a localized area.               | Sets up combos, limits enemy movement.                 |
| **Knives**     | Ranged Attack | Throws multiple knives at a distance.              | Mid-range poke, combo extender, good damage.           |
| **Timestop**   | Ultimate     | Temporarily freezes all opponents in an area.      | Unrivaled combo potential, escape, or setup.           |
| **Kick Volley**| Melee Attack | A series of powerful kicks.                        | High burst damage, can launch enemies.                 |

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip: The World's Core">
Focus on mastering **Encirclement** and **Timestop** to create devastating combo opportunities. Encirclement can group enemies or set up a single target for a barrage, while Timestop allows you to unleash your full arsenal without retaliation.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="How to Obtain The World Stand">

Acquiring a legendary Stand like The World requires a combination of persistence and luck. The primary method involves using Stand Arrows, with Lucky Arrows offering a higher chance for rare Stands and skins.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Gather Stand Arrows">
    Stand Arrows are your main currency for rolling new Stands. They can be found randomly on the ground throughout the map, dropped from chests, or rewarded for completing various quests. Pay close attention to environmental spawns, especially in areas like Morioh-cho.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Seek Out Lucky Arrows">
    Lucky Arrows provide an enhanced chance of obtaining legendary Stands and often come with unique Stand Skins. These are rarer than regular Stand Arrows and can be acquired from Legendary Chests, certain World Events like Meteor Showers, or purchased from Prestige and Raid Shops.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Utilize the Reroll System">
    Once you have a Stand Arrow, navigate to your inventory and use it to reroll your current Stand. Remember, using an arrow will overwrite your existing Stand, so ensure you store any Stands you wish to keep in the Stand Storage before attempting a reroll.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Participate in World Events">
    World Events, particularly the Meteor Shower, are excellent opportunities to farm Stand Arrows and Lucky Arrows. These events occur periodically and can yield a significant number of arrows if you're quick and prepared for potential PvP.
  </Step>
</Steps>

| Arrow Source       | Method                                         | Rarity         | Notes                                                |
| :----------------- | :--------------------------------------------- | :------------- | :--------------------------------------------------- |
| **Ground Spawns**  | Randomly appears across the map.               | Common         | Check Morioh-cho, Devil's Palm Desert.               |
| **Quests**         | Rewards for completing main story or side quests. | Common         | Good early-game source.                              |
| **Chests**         | Found in various locations, can be looted.     | Uncommon       | Higher chance for better loot.                       |
| **Meteor Shower**  | World Event at Morioh Train Station.           | Uncommon/Rare  | Spawns many Stand Arrows, potential PvP.             |
| **Legendary Chests** | Rare drops from bosses or specific events.     | Rare           | Best chance for Lucky Arrows.                        |
| **Raid Shops**     | Purchased with Raid Tokens.                    | Rare           | Reliable source if you can farm raids.               |

<Callout type="warning" title="Important Consideration">
The World is a Legendary Stand, meaning its drop rate is very low. It might take numerous attempts to obtain it. Don't be discouraged if you don't get it immediately; persistence is key. Consider saving up multiple arrows before rolling.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Mastering The World's Conjuration & Skills">

Once you've acquired The World, your next goal is to maximize its Stand Conjuration. This stat is crucial as it unlocks powerful passive perks and enhances your Stand's overall effectiveness.

Stand Conjuration levels up as you actively use your Stand in combat. This includes:
*   Defeating enemies (NPCs and players).
*   Completing quests and missions.
*   Winning in Ranked Gamemode.

The most efficient way to farm Conjuration for The World, especially in the early stages, is through meditation.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Head to the Gym">
    Locate the Gym building, typically found near Bus Stop 2. This facility is central to improving your Stand's capabilities.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Meditate on a Mat">
    Inside the Gym, find one of the sitting mats. Interacting with it (usually by pressing 'E') will transport you to your personal meditation realm.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Confront Your Inner Self">
    In this realm, you will encounter an NPC version of yourself equipped with your current Stand. Engaging and defeating this inner self is the primary method for gaining Conjuration experience.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Repeat for Maximum Gains">
    Repeatedly defeating your inner self will quickly increase your Stand Conjuration. As your Conjuration level rises, The World will visibly manifest more fully, and you'll unlock new passive perks. Early levels can grant 10,000 Conjuration per kill, making this a highly efficient method.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="tip" title="Maximizing Conjuration">
Your Stand's passive perks, unlocked at higher Conjuration levels, can significantly boost its performance. For The World, focus on perks that enhance damage, reduce cooldowns, or improve M1 attacks. Don't forget to allocate skill points into **Stand Power** and **Speciality** to complement The World's abilities.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Unlocking Stand Awakening for The World">

Stand Awakening is the ultimate progression for your Stand, unlocking enhanced abilities, a powerful ultimate move, and a visual transformation. For The World, this is where its true potential is unleashed, including its iconic Time Stop ultimate.

To awaken The World, you must meet two main requirements and then complete a specific questline.

<Checklist
  id="awakening-requirements"
  title="Stand Awakening Pre-requisites:"
  items={[
    "Reach Player Level 50 (Maximum Level)",
    "Achieve 100+ Stand Conjuration (Maximum for your Stand)",
    "Ensure The World is an Awakening-Compatible Stand"
  ]}
/>

Once these conditions are met, proceed with the Awakening Quest:

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initiate the Quest at the Gym">
    Return to the Gym building (Bus Stop 2) and sit on a meditation mat to enter your realm. Talk to the NPC (your inner self) and select the dialogue option: **"I want to surpass my limits."**
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Complete Stand Awakening Quest 1">
    This quest requires you to defeat specific raid bosses: **Jotaro Kujo**, **Muhammad Avdol**, and **DIO** (raid version). You must defeat each of them at least once.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Complete Stand Awakening Quest 2">
    The second part of the quest involves participating in **50 World Events**. This can be time-consuming, but you can expedite it by AFK farming in private servers with alt accounts or friends.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Confront Your Inner Self (Final Battle)">
    After completing the first two quests, you will need to defeat your inner self in the meditation realm 13 times. This final challenge prepares you for the ultimate boss fight.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Defeat the Awakening Boss">
    Once the previous steps are done, selecting "I want to surpass my limits" again will trigger the boss fight for your Awakening. Defeat this boss to unlock The World's ultimate awakened form and its powerful **Time Stop** ability.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="success" title="Awakened Benefits">
An awakened The World grants significantly increased damage for all its abilities, improved effects, and a new ultimate move. The visual transformation of your Stand will also reflect its newfound power.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Optimizing Your The World Build">

To truly dominate with **bizarre lineage the world**, combining it with the right Sub-Ability and Fighting Style is essential. This creates a synergistic build that amplifies The World's strengths.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Time Stop Dominator">
    - **Stand**: The World
    - **Sub-Ability**: Hamon
    - **Fighting Style**: Boxing
    - **Playstyle**: Combo, Burst Damage
    - **Notes**: Hamon boosts damage, especially against Vampires, and Boxing provides high M1 damage and fast attacks, perfect for time stop combos.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Tanky Time Lord">
    - **Stand**: The World
    - **Sub-Ability**: Vampire
    - **Fighting Style**: Kendo
    - **Playstyle**: Sustain, Control
    - **Notes**: Vampire provides life steal for survivability, while Kendo offers reach and control, allowing you to outlast opponents and set up Time Stop.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Speedy Assassin">
    - **Stand**: The World
    - **Sub-Ability**: Cyborg
    - **Fighting Style**: Karate
    - **Playstyle**: Hit-and-run, Versatile
    - **Notes**: Cyborg offers mobility and ranged options, complementing The World's close-range focus, while Karate provides balanced damage and versatility for agile combat.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

Stat allocation is equally important. For The World, prioritize stats that enhance its offensive capabilities and ensure you have enough survivability.

| Stat           | Priority | Impact on The World                                 | Recommended Allocation (Example) |
| :------------- | :------- | :-------------------------------------------------- | :------------------------------- |
| **Vitality**   | High     | Increases Max HP and regeneration for survivability. | **40-50**                        |
| **Stand Power**| Very High| Boosts Stand ability damage (crucial for combos).   | **35-50**                        |
| **Durability** | Medium   | Reduces incoming damage, useful for extended fights. | **15-20**                        |
| **Speed**      | Low/Medium | Increases movement and attack speed; reduces cooldowns. | **0-10** (unless specific need)  |
| **Special**    | Low      | Enhances Sub-Ability and Fighting Style damage.     | **0-10** (if using a strong spec) |

<Callout type="info" title="Build Synergy">
For the "Time Stop Dominator" build, allocating more points into **Stand Power** and **Vitality** will ensure your combos hit hard and you can survive long enough to execute them. Hamon adds a significant damage boost to your attacks during Time Stop.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Bizarre Lineage The World: Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What makes The World a top-tier Stand in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "The World is an A-tier Stand due to its exceptional close-range damage, powerful combo potential, and the game-changing Time Stop ability. This allows players to control fights, unleash high burst damage, and dominate both PvP and PvE scenarios."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I get Stand Arrows to obtain The World?",
    answer: "Stand Arrows can be acquired by finding them on the ground in various locations, completing quests, opening chests, or participating in World Events like Meteor Showers. Lucky Arrows, which increase your chances for rare Stands, can be found in Legendary Chests or purchased from Raid Shops."
  },
  {
    question: "What are the requirements for awakening The World Stand?",
    answer: "To awaken The World, you must reach Player Level 50 and achieve 100 Stand Conjuration. Afterward, you'll need to complete a series of quests involving defeating raid bosses (Jotaro, Avdol, Dio), participating in 50 World Events, and confronting your inner self multiple times in the meditation realm."
  },
  {
    question: "Which Sub-Ability and Fighting Style best complement Bizarre Lineage The World?",
    answer: "For a highly aggressive, combo-focused playstyle with The World, pairing it with Hamon (for damage boost) and Boxing (for high M1 damage and fast attacks) is highly recommended. This combination excels at maximizing damage during Time Stop."
  }
]} />

</Section>
